Description: 24-hour Pilot travel center at I-40 Exit 143 (TN-13/Waverly-Hurricane Mills). Approx. 180 truck parking spaces (incl. reserved Prime spots), 10-11 diesel lanes, 8 showers, Arby's, laundry, CAT scale, and Southern Tire Mart truck tire shop on site.

Description: 60-room motel at I-40 Exit 143 (TN-13, Waverly/Hurricane Mills) with explicitly advertised free large-vehicle/RV/bus/truck parking, free breakfast, guest laundry, and 24-hour front desk.

Business Name: Dickson County Rest Area - I-40 Eastbound (MM 170)
Description: HELD: TDOT-operated rest area on I-40 East near mile marker 170 (between Exits 163 and 172) with separate truck parking, restrooms, and picnic tables. Listed on TDOT SmartWay, but no civic street address is published by an official TN source, so held per rest-area rule.

Business Name: Dickson County Rest Area - I-40 Westbound (MM 170)
Description: HELD: TDOT-operated rest area on I-40 West near mile marker 170 with truck parking and restrooms. No civic address published by an official TN source. Additionally, TDOT closed this westbound facility in October 2025 after a restroom fire caused extensive damage; no confirmation found that it has reopened as of July 2026.

Business Name: Truck Parking Club property - 1420 TN-96, Fairview
Description: HELD: Bookable paid truck/trailer parking property listed by Truck Parking Club at 1420 TN-96, Fairview (near I-40 Exit 182). Only one source (Truck Parking Club) found; property name, ZIP, capacity, and current status unverified.
